---
name: component-integrity-checker
description: Evaluates component clarity, labeling, iconography, and statefulness. Use to identify micro-level UX issues. Keywords: component, clarity, labeling, iconography, states, micro-UX.
---

# Functionality
Audits individual components for clarity, affordance, labeling, iconography, and statefulness. Identifies micro-level UX issues that affect usability.

# When to Use
Use when reviewing buttons, inputs, cards, lists, modals, or any reusable component.

# Instructions
Inspect component → evaluate clarity → check labels → assess iconography → verify states → identify issues only.

# Output Format
- Labeling/Clarity Issues  
- Iconography Problems  
- Missing/Weak States  
- Affordance Issues  
- Component Behavior Inconsistencies  

# Example
“Check this component for UX integrity issues.”
